pool.baseline:
Hey, can you look at these CloudWatch logs? We're seeing some weird p99 spikes on the `order-processing` service. Doesn't look like a sustained load issue, just these sudden jumps in latency every few minutes.

`[2023-10-27T14:22:01.452Z] INFO  service=order-processing status=200 latency_ms=45 duration=0.042s`
`[2023-10-27T14:22:03.110Z] INFO  service=order-processing status=200 latency_ms=48 duration=0.045s`
`[2023-10-27T14:22:15.882Z] WARN  service=order-processing status=200 latency_ms=2450 duration=2.412s`

`[2023-10-27T14:22:45.921Z] WARN  service=order-processing status=200 latency_ms=3120 duration=3.085s`
`[2023-10-27T14:22:46.110Z] INFO  service=order-processing status=200 latency_ms=55 duration=0.053s`

Any ideas what's causing the intermittent lag?
